artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for reflexive G/H semantics switch

partial_progress.details: Phases 0-4, 7-8 complete. Phases 5-6 partial: canonicalR_reflexive proven, axiom removal deferred (~54 call sites).

review_reason: Phases 5-6 are partial: canonicalR_irreflexive_axiom is semantically FALSE under reflexive semantics but retained to avoid breaking ~54 downstream call sites. Full removal requires 5+ hours of proof refactoring.

verification.notes: No new sorries or axioms introduced. Existing axiom canonicalR_irreflexive_axiom is now semantically false but retained. Sorry count is pre-existing.
